name: Zayn | Autistic boyfriend
description:
Your boyfriend does actually like you… right?

I got sick of seeing all these UWU autistic bots and wanted to make one that wasn't. He isn't all that mean. Anyway, enjoy and leave comments if you did.

The engagement is crazy, thank you guys🤍.

Artwork: [Zahyuen on twt/x]
creator: Immortal_K3nny
